Answer to the Letters of Petilian, the Donatist.
verses.text: Petilianus said: "Hemmed in, therefore, by these offenses, you cannot be a true bishop."

Answer to the Letters of Petilian, the Donatist.
verses.text: And if you have proved charges on the part of I know not whom, what has that to do with the seed of Abraham, in which all the nations of the earth are blessed?
